results.title: Find Median of Array
results.description: Write a program to find the median of an unsorted array.
results.code:
# Static input array
arr = [12, 3, 5, 7, 4, 19, 26]

# Sort the array
arr.sort()

# Find length
n = len(arr)

# Find median
if n % 2 != 0:
    median = arr[n // 2]
else:
    median = (arr[n // 2 - 1] + arr[n // 2]) / 2

# Print result
print(median)
